If you notice an issue, please consider making an edit, starting a discussion on the article's talk page, or reaching out via the [Arknights Terra Wiki Discord](https://discord.gg/2eXU4KHYpB). # Arknights Terra Wiki From Arknights Terra Wiki [Jump to navigation](https://arknights.wiki.gg/#mw-head) [Jump to search](https://arknights.wiki.gg/#searchInput) Welcome to the Arknights Terra Wiki, Doctor! We are an unofficial, community-driven information website about the mobile tower defense game, _[Arknights](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Arknights "Arknights")_, currently hosting [16,713 articles](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Special:Statistics "Special:Statistics"). Do remember to visit the [policies and guidelines page](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Arknights_Terra_Wiki:Policies_and_guidelines "Arknights Terra Wiki:Policies and guidelines") to know the dos and don'ts of the Arknights Terra Wiki. **NOTICE:** The Arknights Terra Wiki contains **[SPOILERS](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Arknights_Terra_Wiki:Regarding_spoilers "Arknights Terra Wiki:Regarding spoilers")** for content not yet released on the Global server of _Arknights._ Proceed at your own risk! Please note that the Arknights Terra Wiki is understaffed at this time, thus some articles may be incomplete and the updating of existing articles may be slower than expected. If you wish to help out by joining the wiki's administration team, please contact the [administrators](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Arknights_Terra_Wiki:Administrators "Arknights Terra Wiki:Administrators"). If you are a wiki editor from Fandom, you can reclaim your username [through this link](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Special:ClaimExternalAccount "Special:ClaimExternalAccount"). We have a sister wiki dedicated to _[Arknights: Endfield](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Arknights:_Endfield "Arknights: Endfield"):_ the [Endfield Talos Wiki](https://endfield.wiki.gg/wiki/Endfield_Talos_Wiki)! About _**Arknights**_ is a mobile tower defense (TD) game developed by [Hypergryph](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Hypergryph "Hypergryph"). It was first released in China (CN) on May 1, 2019, followed by releases in Japan, Korea, North America, Europe, and Southeast Asia (collectively referred to as Global) by [Yostar](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Yostar "Yostar") on January 16, 2020, and in Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Macau (TW) by Longcheng on June 29, 2020. At first glance, _Arknights_ may appear to be a typical TD game, but it distinguishes itself with a high level of difficulty due to intricate map designs, unique enemy mechanics, and complex combat puzzles. A core strength of the game lies in [Operator](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Operator "Operator") management—strategically deploying units and using their abilities effectively is essential for success. Additionally, the game includes a robust base-building system that supports resource generation and Operator development. _Arknights_ uses a gacha system for acquiring new Operators. However, most stages are designed to be completable using Operators of more common rarities. The [Recruitment](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Recruitment "Recruitment") system also allows players to obtain many older, high-rarity Operators for free, though this is relatively rare. Due to staggered release schedules and other regional differences, the Global server is typically about 6 months behind the CN server, while the TW server currently lags by 7 months, placing it approximately a month behind Global. **[Read more...](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Arknights "Arknights")** Social Media Links [EN website](https://www.arknights.global/) [Official EN Discord server](https://discord.gg/arknights) [EN Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/ArknightsGlobal/) [EN Twitter/X](https://twitter.com/ArknightsEN) [EN Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/arknights_messenger_official/) [Arknights Terra Wiki Discord server](https://discord.gg/gvQznpB) - Buckle up, as the [long awaited journey](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Medjehtiqedti_Bound "Medjehtiqedti Bound") to [Minos](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Minos "Minos") is finally here! As we accompany [Lena](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Perfumer_the_Distilled "Perfumer the Distilled") in her journey back home, we'll also meet [a familiar face](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Titi "Titi") from [Sargon](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Sargon "Sargon") in her quest to bring the two nations together! A new adventure means new outfits and more treasures await us! Additionally, with July around the corner, the Global server's 6.5th anniversary is nearing too! Expect a [return to Baizao](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Such_is_the_Joy_of_Our_Reunion/Rerun "Such is the Joy of Our Reunion/Rerun") and a sneak peek to [the culmination of a thousand year game](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/First_of_A_Thousand_Autumns "First of A Thousand Autumns") in the coming weeks! For our editors and readers who happened to be Venezuelans, in light of the recent double earthquake that struck the country, we in the Arknights Terra Wiki prays for your safety and that of your families and loved ones. Stay strong and safe out there! ![Did You Know sticker.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Did_You_Know_sticker.png/128px-Did_You_Know_sticker.png?8fda22) - ...that the Arknights Celebration events were previously labeled as "Gift of the Deep Ones" and "One Giant Leap"? - ...that [Sui's Garden of Grotesqueries](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Sui%27s_Garden_of_Grotesqueries "Sui's Garden of Grotesqueries") is the first [Integrated Strategies](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Integrated_Strategies "Integrated Strategies") theme whose release is not delayed until after yearly anniversary events in the Global server? - ...that the ["Saint"](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/The_First_Saint/Enemy "The First Saint/Enemy") has two forms _and_ uses Sacrament of Genesis four times on [MT-S-5](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/MT-S-5 "MT-S-5")'s [Challenge Mode](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Challenge_Mode "Challenge Mode"), making her the [boss](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Boss_enemy "Boss enemy") with multiple phases that has the most phases at six? - ...that there are currently a total of 1,460 enemies divided across 11 types? - ...that [W](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/W "W") and [Wiš'adel](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Wi%C5%A1%27adel "Wiš'adel") are the only [alternate Operator](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Alternate_Operator "Alternate Operator") pair who are both [limited Operators](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Limited_Operator "Limited Operator")? - ...that one Sanctuary Rating in [Contingency Contract](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Contingency_Contract "Contingency Contract") requires an [Operator](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Operator "Operator")'s [DP](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/DP "DP") cost to ramp up to at least 90? - ...that the [English CVs](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/English_CV "English CV") of [Spot](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Spot "Spot") and [Wulfenite](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Wulfenite "Wulfenite") also voice the male and female Endministrator, respectively, in _[Arknights: Endfield](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Arknights:_Endfield "Arknights: Endfield")_? Featured Operator ![Titi Elite 2.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Titi_Elite_2.png/497px-Titi_Elite_2.png?253558) Medjehtiqedti, better known as **Titi**, is the director of the Varjavandabad Museum and title character of [Medjehtiqedti Bound](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Medjehtiqedti_Bound "Medjehtiqedti Bound"), where she makes her playable debut as a [6★](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/6-star "6-star") [Incantation Medic](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Medic/Incantation_Medic "Medic/Incantation Medic") after previously appearing as a supporting character in [Adventure That Cannot Wait for the Sun](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Adventure_That_Cannot_Wait_for_the_Sun "Adventure That Cannot Wait for the Sun"). Titi joins the ranks of Rhodes Island specializing in [Sleep](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Sleep "Sleep") based skills and talents; she can attack enemy units affected by the debuff and inflict passive Arts damage per second on them, as well as deal additional damage to immobile enemy units. Additionally, she can boost the ASPD of Minoan and Sargonian Operators when their HP is higher than 50% via a Vigor effect. With her skills, she can either increase her ATK and chances of inflicting Sleep to enemy units; lull herself and the Operator with the lowest HP in range to Sleep which in turn triggers the debuff on surrounding enemies and doubles the effect of her first talent; or simultaneously attack two enemies and inflict Sleep, whilst awakened enemies are dealt Arts damage and lull a nearby enemy to Sleep, and defeated Operators within range are put to Sleep until their HP is fully restored or the skill duration ends. Titi is voiced in Japanese by [Hiromi Igarashi](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hiromi_Igarashi "wikipedia:Hiromi Igarashi"), whose notable roles include Anzu Futaba in _The iDOLM@STER: Cinderella Girls_ and Corin Wickes in _Zenless Zone Zero_; and in English by [Christina Costello](https://www.christinacostello.net/), who also voices [Ceobe](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ceobe "Ceobe") and is best known for her roles as Collei in _Genshin Impact_, Sophia in _Punishing: Gray Raven_, and Mozzarella Cookie in _Cookie Run: Kingdom_. .sk-fading-circle { margin: 100px auto; width: 40px; height: 40px; position: relative; }

.sk-fading-circle .sk-circle { width: 100%; height: 100%; position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; }

.sk-fading-circle .sk-circle::before { content: ""; display: block; margin: 0px auto; width: 15%; height: 15%; background-color: var(--theme-page-text-color); border-radius: 100%; animation: 1.2s ease-in-out 0s infinite normal both running sk-circleFadeDelay; }

.sk-fading-circle .sk-circle2 { transform: rotate(30deg); }

.sk-fading-circle .sk-circle3 { transform: rotate(60deg); }

.sk-fading-circle .sk-circle4 { transform: rotate(90deg); }

.sk-fading-circle .sk-circle5 { transform: rotate(120deg); }

.sk-fading-circle .sk-circle6 { transform: rotate(150deg); }

.sk-fading-circle .sk-circle7 { transform: rotate(180deg); }

.sk-fading-circle .sk-circle8 { transform: rotate(210deg); }

.sk-fading-circle .sk-circle10 { transform: rotate(270deg); }

.sk-fading-circle .sk-circle12 { transform: rotate(330deg); }

.sk-fading-circle .sk-circle2::before { animation-delay: -1.1s; }

.sk-fading-circle .sk-circle3::before { animation-delay: -1s; }

.sk-fading-circle .sk-circle4::before { animation-delay: -0.9s; }

.sk-fading-circle .sk-circle5::before { animation-delay: -0.8s; }

.sk-fading-circle .sk-circle6::before { animation-delay: -0.7s; }

@-webkit-keyframes sk-circleFadeDelay { 
  0%, 39%, 100% { opacity: 0; }
  40% { opacity: 1; }
}

				<div id="siteNotice"><div class="mw-dismissable-notice" data-nosnippet="" data-dismiss-key="1.0"><div class="mw-dismissable-notice-close"><form method="POST">[<button type="submit"><a role="button">dismiss</a></button>]</form></div><div class="mw-dismissable-notice-body"><div id="localNotice" data-nosnippet=""><div class="sitenotice" lang="en" dir="ltr"><p>The <i>Arknights Terra Wiki</i> is a collaborative, community-maintained wiki. If you notice an issue, please consider making an edit, starting a discussion on the article's talk page, or reaching out via the <a rel="nofollow" class="external text" href="https://discord.gg/2eXU4KHYpB">Arknights Terra Wiki Discord</a>.

				<h1 id="firstHeading" class="firstHeading mw-first-heading" style="display: none"><span class="mw-page-title-main">Arknights Terra Wiki</span></h1>
				<div id="bodyContent" class="vector-body">
					<div id="siteSub" class="noprint">From Arknights Terra Wiki</div>
					<div id="contentSub"></div>
					<div id="contentSub2"></div>
					
					<div id="jump-to-nav"></div>
					<a class="mw-jump-link" href="https://arknights.wiki.gg/#mw-head">Jump to navigation</a>
					<a class="mw-jump-link" href="https://arknights.wiki.gg/#searchInput">Jump to search</a>
					<div id="mw-content-text" class="mw-body-content"><div class="mw-content-ltr mw-parser-output" lang="en" dir="ltr"><div class="mp-box"><div style="font-size:16px; font-weight:bold; margin-top:1em; text-align:center; color:var(--theme-accent-color);">Welcome to the Arknights Terra Wiki, Doctor!</div><div style="margin:1em; text-align:center;">We are an unofficial, community-driven information website about the mobile tower defense game, <i><a href="https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Arknights" title="Arknights">Arknights</a></i>, currently hosting <u><a href="https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Special:Statistics" title="Special:Statistics">16,713 articles</a></u>.<br>Do remember to visit the <a href="https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Arknights_Terra_Wiki:Policies_and_guidelines" title="Arknights Terra Wiki:Policies and guidelines">policies and guidelines page</a> to know the dos and don'ts of the Arknights Terra Wiki.<div style="margin:1em 0; color:#FFFF00;"><span style="color:#FF0000;"><b>NOTICE:</b></span> The Arknights Terra Wiki contains <b><a href="https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Arknights_Terra_Wiki:Regarding_spoilers" title="Arknights Terra Wiki:Regarding spoilers">SPOILERS</a></b> for content not yet released on the Global server of <i>Arknights.</i> Proceed at your own risk!</div><span style="color:#FFFF00;">Please note that the Arknights Terra Wiki is understaffed at this time, thus some articles may be incomplete and the updating of existing articles may be slower than expected. If you wish to help out by joining the wiki's administration team, please contact the <a href="https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Arknights_Terra_Wiki:Administrators" title="Arknights Terra Wiki:Administrators">administrators</a>.</span><div style="margin-top:1em;">If you are a wiki editor from Fandom, you can reclaim your username <a href="https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Special:ClaimExternalAccount" title="Special:ClaimExternalAccount">through this link</a>.</div><div style="margin-top:1em;">We have a sister wiki dedicated to <i><a href="https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Arknights:_Endfield" title="Arknights: Endfield">Arknights: Endfield</a>:</i> the <a class="external text" href="https://endfield.wiki.gg/wiki/Endfield_Talos_Wiki">Endfield Talos Wiki</a>!</div></div></div><div class="mp-box"><div class="mp-head">About</div><div style="margin:1em;"><i><b>Arknights</b></i> is a mobile tower defense (TD) game developed by <a href="https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Hypergryph" title="Hypergryph">Hypergryph</a>. It was first released in China (CN) on May 1, 2019, followed by releases in Japan, Korea, North America, Europe, and Southeast Asia (collectively referred to as Global) by <a href="https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Yostar" title="Yostar">Yostar</a> on January 16, 2020, and in Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Macau (TW) by Longcheng on June 29, 2020.<br><br>At first glance, <i>Arknights</i> may appear to be a typical TD game, but it distinguishes itself with a high level of difficulty due to intricate map designs, unique enemy mechanics, and complex combat puzzles. A core strength of the game lies in <a href="https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Operator" title="Operator">Operator</a> management—strategically deploying units and using their abilities effectively is essential for success. Additionally, the game includes a robust base-building system that supports resource generation and Operator development.<br><br><i>Arknights</i> uses a gacha system for acquiring new Operators. However, most stages are designed to be completable using Operators of more common rarities. The <a href="https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Recruitment" title="Recruitment">Recruitment</a> system also allows players to obtain many older, high-rarity Operators for free, though this is relatively rare.<br><br>Due to staggered release schedules and other regional differences, the Global server is typically about 6 months behind the CN server, while the TW server currently lags by 7 months, placing it approximately a month behind Global.<div style="text-align:right;"><b><a href="https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Arknights" title="Arknights">Read more...</a></b></div></div></div><div class="mp-box"><div class="mp-head">Social Media Links</div><div style="margin:1em auto; display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:10px; justify-content:center;"><div class="mp-button"><span class="plainlinks"><a rel="nofollow" class="external text" href="https://www.arknights.global/"><span style="color:white;">EN website</span></a></span></div><div class="mp-button" style="background:#5865f2;"><span class="plainlinks"><a rel="nofollow" class="external text" href="https://discord.gg/arknights"><span style="color:white;">Official EN Discord server</span></a></span></div><div class="mp-button" style="background:#4267b2;"><span class="plainlinks"><a rel="nofollow" class="external text" href="https://www.facebook.com/ArknightsGlobal/"><span style="color:white;">EN Facebook</span></a></span></div><div class="mp-button" style="background:#1da1f2;"><span class="plainlinks"><a rel="nofollow" class="external text" href="https://twitter.com/ArknightsEN"><span style="color:white;">EN Twitter/X</span></a></span></div><div class="mp-button" style="background:#c92c8d;"><span class="plainlinks"><a rel="nofollow" class="external text" href="https://www.instagram.com/arknights_messenger_official/"><span style="color:white;">EN Instagram</span></a></span></div><div class="mp-button" style="background:#5865f2;"><span class="plainlinks"><a rel="nofollow" class="external text" href="https://discord.gg/gvQznpB"><span style="color:white;">Arknights Terra Wiki Discord server</span></a></span></div></div></div><div class="mp-links columns-max plain">

data-file-height="2069"></div></div></div><div style="margin:1em auto;">Medjehtiqedti, better known as <b>Titi</b>, is the director of the Varjavandabad Museum and title character of <a href="https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Medjehtiqedti_Bound" title="Medjehtiqedti Bound">Medjehtiqedti Bound</a>, where she makes her playable debut as a <a href="https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/6-star" class="mw-redirect" title="6-star">6★</a> <a href="https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Medic/Incantation_Medic" title="Medic/Incantation Medic">Incantation Medic</a> after previously appearing as a supporting character in <a href="https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Adventure_That_Cannot_Wait_for_the_Sun" title="Adventure That Cannot Wait for the Sun">Adventure That Cannot Wait for the Sun</a>.<br><br>Titi joins the ranks of Rhodes Island specializing in <a href="https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Sleep" title="Sleep">Sleep</a> based skills and talents; she can attack enemy units affected by the debuff and inflict passive Arts damage per second on them, as well as deal additional damage to immobile enemy units. Additionally, she can boost the ASPD of Minoan and Sargonian Operators when their HP is higher than 50% via a Vigor effect. With her skills, she can either increase her ATK and chances of inflicting Sleep to enemy units; lull herself and the Operator with the lowest HP in range to Sleep which in turn triggers the debuff on surrounding enemies and doubles the effect of her first talent; or simultaneously attack two enemies and inflict Sleep, whilst awakened enemies are dealt Arts damage and lull a nearby enemy to Sleep, and defeated Operators within range are put to Sleep until their HP is fully restored or the skill duration ends.<br><br>Titi is voiced in Japanese by <a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hiromi_Igarashi" class="extiw" title="wikipedia:Hiromi Igarashi">Hiromi Igarashi</a>, whose notable roles include Anzu Futaba in <i>The iDOLM@STER: Cinderella Girls</i> and Corin Wickes in <i>Zenless Zone Zero</i>; and in English by <a rel="nofollow" class="external text" href="https://www.christinacostello.net/">Christina Costello</a>, who also voices <a href="https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ceobe" title="Ceobe">Ceobe</a> and is best known for her roles as Collei in <i>Genshin Impact</i>, Sophia in <i>Punishing: Gray Raven</i>, and Mozzarella Cookie in <i>Cookie Run: Kingdom</i>.</div><div><a href="https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Titi" title="Titi"><b>Read more...</b></a></div></div></div></div><div style="clear:both;"><div class="mp-box"><div class="mp-head">Supply operations of the day</div><div style="margin:1em;
